items.name: Topology collection failure
items.knowledgeSummary: Veeam ONE Monitoring Server failed to collect infrastructure topology
items.knowledgeCause: Virtual Server might not be accessible
items.knowledgeResolution: Make sure Virtual Server is accessible
items.knowledgeExternal: See a corresponding event description for more information

items.name: Performance data collection failure
items.knowledgeSummary: Veeam ONE Monitoring Server failed to collect performance data from the objects specified
items.knowledgeCause: There might be multiple reasons for this:Virtual Server might not be accessibleVirtual Server is under heavy load
items.knowledgeResolution: Verify that Virtual Server is availableMake sure firewall on Virtual Server allows incoming connectionsCheck account permissions used to connect to Virtual Server specifiedUse native tools to test connection to specified server
items.knowledgeExternal: See a corresponding event description for more information

items.name: Events data collection failure
items.knowledgeSummary: Veeam ONE Monitoring Server failed to collect events data from the objects specified
items.knowledgeCause: There might be multiple reasons for this:Virtual Server might not be accessibleVirtual Server is under heavy load
items.knowledgeResolution: Verify that Virtual Server is availableMake sure firewall on Virtual Server allows incoming connectionsCheck account permissions used to connect to Virtual Server specifiedUse native tools to test connection to specified server
items.knowledgeExternal: See a corresponding event description for more information

items.name: Veeam ONE license exceeded
items.knowledgeSummary: You have exceeded your license limit, and are no longer compliant with your Veeam licensing agreement.
items.knowledgeCause: The number of monitored workloads from Veeam Backup & Replication or virtual infrastructure or the number of monitored server sockets does not match the value specified in the license file.
items.knowledgeResolution: To avoid service interruptions from future growth, we recommend you deploy an updated license key to cover the newly monitored workloads.
